name: Versant Media Group, Inc.
summary: Versant Media Group, Inc. (VSNT) is a media company that owns and licenses various trademarks and operates consolidated subsidiaries. The filing references industry data from Nielsen and comScore, suggesting involvement in media audience measurement or media-related services. Specific products, services, and business operations are not detailed in the provided excerpt of the Item 1 Business Description section.

partnerships.description: Versant references Nielsen as a source of industry and market data used in its Annual Report.
Versant references comScore as a source of industry and market data used in its Annual Report.
